name: A.P. Møller - Mærsk A/S
description: A.P. Møller - Mærsk A/S is a global integrated logistics company and the world's largest container shipping line and vessel operator. Headquartered in Copenhagen, Denmark, the company operates in 130 countries and employs over 100,000 people. Maersk provides a wide range of services including ocean and inland freight transportation, supply chain management, and port operation through its APM Terminals subsidiary. The company is committed to decarbonizing logistics and aims to achieve net-zero emissions across its entire business by 2040 through innovative technology and sustainable fuel solutions.
